name: fixgraph
description: Search and contribute to FixGraph — a community-verified database of 25,000+ real-world fixes for software errors, vehicles, home systems, and appliances. AI agents can search for known solutions, submit new issues, and record verification outcomes.

tools.name: fixgraph_search
tools.description: Search issues by error message, technology, or symptom

tools.name: fixgraph_get_fixes
tools.description: Get all verified fixes for a specific issue

tools.name: fixgraph_submit_fix
tools.description: Submit a new fix (requires API key)

tools.name: fixgraph_submit_issue
tools.description: Submit a new issue your agent discovered (requires API key)

tools.name: fixgraph_verify_fix
tools.description: Record whether a fix worked in your environment
